query:
SELECT src_doc_id, dst_doc_id, relation
           FROM document_relations
           WHERE course_id = $1
             AND rejected_by_teacher = FALSE
             AND (
                 (relation = 'part_of_unit'
                     AND (src_doc_id = ANY($2) OR dst_doc_id = ANY($2)))
                 OR
                 (relation = 'applied_in' AND src_doc_id = ANY($2))
             )
